description: Create the base HTML structure with CSS styles, accordion JavaScript, header, quick navigation buttons skeleton, and footer. This sets up the redesigned page framework without product content.
steps: Completely rewrite index.html with a new masterpiece-quality redesign
Include full inline CSS with: Manulife green (#00a758) primary color scheme, Inter font from Google Fonts, smooth gradients, glassmorphism effects, modern card styling, responsive design
Add a hero header with title 'Manulife File Penting' and subtitle 'Directory Per 02 Juni 2026'

Add a quick navigation section at the top with buttons that link to each section/card using anchor IDs. Button labels should be the product names (MIUHC, MDLA, MPS Flexi, MPPS, MCCP, MDWA, MSP, MIFIP, MiPrecious, MPDS, PAP, MiSSION/MDSA, MiAction, plus Section II and III names)
Add accordion JavaScript that allows clicking on a card header to expand/collapse its content with smooth animation. Cards should start collapsed.
Add Section I heading: 'I. Simple Produk Knowledge'

Add all 14 product cards for Section I with accordion functionality. Each card needs: icon, title, description, and link list from the source. Use these products with their data from the converted HTML source file (line 87):

Add Section II heading and content: 'II. Financing, Keagenan & AAJI, Kompensasi'. Use accordion cards for each sub-section.
Add Section III heading and content: 'III. Starter Kit & New Agent Tools'. Use accordion cards for each sub-section (Selling Tools, Recruiting Tools, Submit Tools).
Add footer at the bottom: 'edited by @petrusjakub' where 'petrusjakub' is a clickable link to https://instagram.com/petrusjakub, and 'copyright 2026'
Ensure all cards start collapsed and expand on click with smooth CSS transitions
acceptance_criteria: index.html contains a complete redesigned page with all content from the source converted HTML
Navigation buttons at top link to each card/section via anchor IDs
Each product card uses accordion expand/collapse on click with smooth animation
Footer shows 'edited by @petrusjakub' with link to Instagram and 'copyright 2026'
All Google Drive links from the source are preserved correctly
Page is responsive and works on mobile
CSS and JS are inline (single self-contained HTML file)
Design is masterpiece quality with modern aesthetics
verification: Run grep to verify index.html contains accordion JS functionality
Run grep to verify the Instagram link is present in the footer
Run grep to verify navigation buttons exist
Run grep to verify key product links are present (spot check MIUHC, MCCP, MSP folders)
findings: Successfully created redesigned index.html with products 1-7 of Section I. Includes masterpiece-quality dark theme with glassmorphism, accordion cards, quick navigation with all buttons (including those for future content), and footer. Placeholders added for Products 8-14, Section II, and Section III.
